ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion */,
  "us_size" REAL /* US women's shoe size */,
  "de_size" REAL /* DE (Germany) women's shoe size */,
  "uk_size" REAL /* UK women's shoe size */,
  "fr_size" REAL /* FR (France) women's shoe size */,
  "it_size" REAL /* IT (Italy) women's shoe size */,
  "es_size" REAL /* ES (Spain) women's shoe size */,
  "jp_size" REAL /* JP (Japan) women's shoe size */,
  "size_standard" TEXT /* Size standard (e.g., US, DE, UK) */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., shoes, clothing, accessories) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the price is denominated */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "us_size" REAL /* US women's shoe size */,
  "de_size" REAL /* DE (Germany) women's shoe size */,
  "uk_size" REAL /* UK women's shoe size */,
  "fr_size" REAL /* FR (France) women's shoe size */,
  "it_size" REAL /* IT (Italy) women's shoe size */,
  "es_size" REAL /* ES (Spain) women's shoe size */,
  "jp_size" REAL /* JP (Japan) women's shoe size */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product size in stock */,
  "fit_description" TEXT /* Description of the fit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_standards" (
  "size_standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size standard */,
  "size_standard" TEXT /* Size standard (e.g., US, DE, UK) */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "preferred_size_standard" TEXT /* Customer's preferred size standard (e.g., US, DE, UK) */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the total amount is denominated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product size ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product size */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the price is denominated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_size_id") REFERENCES product_sizes ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "preferred_size" TEXT /* Customer's preferred shoe size (e.g., 5.5 US) */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Customer's preferred language (e.g., en, de) */,
  "preferred_currency" TEXT /* Customer's preferred currency (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Time the customer logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Time the customer logged out */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_fit_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size fit review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product size */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who provided the review */,
  "fit_review" TEXT /* Text of the fit review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_fit_reviews_product_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_size_id") REFERENCES product_sizes ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_fit_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_fit_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product image */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_images_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
